title: ophrys fusca subsp. zonata
intro: Ophrys fusca subsp. zonata, also known as the western bee orchid, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the orchid family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with the western bee orchid include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used as a tea or tincture to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
